      public static final String COMBO_VALUE_UNDEFINED
      See Also:

    • DEBUG

      public static boolean DEBUG
      The debug flag. This is set by the option when the platform is launched. Client should not try to reset this flag.

  • Constructor Details

    • UIUtils

      public UIUtils()

  • Method Details

    • getFreePrefixIndex

      public static String getFreePrefixIndex(IInternalElement parent, IInternalElementType<?> type, IAttributeType.String attributeType, String prefix) throws RodinDBException
      Returns a non already used String index intended to be concatenated to the name or the attribute of an element.
      Parameters:
      parent - the parent node to be looked for
      type - the type of the element to be looked for
      attributeType - the type of the attribute to be looked for. Set to null if the element name should be considered rather than, an attribute value
      prefix - the prefix of the element to be looked for
      Returns:
      a non already used integer index intended to be concatenated to the name or the attribute of an element (if no element of that type already exists, returns beginIndex)
      Throws:
      RodinDBException

    • getFreePrefixIndex

      public static String getFreePrefixIndex(List<? extends IInternalElement> elements, IAttributeType.String attributeType, String prefix) throws RodinDBException
      Returns a non already used String index intended to be concatenated to the name or the attribute of an element.
      Parameters:
      elements - the elements to be looked for
      attributeType - the type of the attribute to be looked for. Set to null if the element name should be considered rather than, an attribute value
      prefix - the prefix of the element to be looked for
      Returns:
      a non already used integer index intended to be concatenated to the name or the attribute of an element (if no element of that type already exists, returns beginIndex)
      Throws:
      RodinDBException

    • getImplicitChildrenOfType

      public static <T extends IInternalElement> List<T> getImplicitChildrenOfType(IInternalElement parent, IInternalElementType<T> type) throws RodinDBException
      Throws:
      RodinDBException

      public static IOpenable getOpenable(Object element)
      Method to return the openable for an object (IRodinElement).

      Returns:
      The IRodinFile corresponding to the input object

    • linkToProverUI

      public static void linkToProverUI(Object obj)
      Link the current object to a Prover UI editor.

      Parameters:
      obj - the object (e.g. a proof obligation or a Rodin file)

    • linkToProverUI

      public static void linkToProverUI(Object obj, boolean activateEditor)
      Link the current object to a Prover UI editor.

      Parameters:
      obj - the object (e.g. a proof obligation or a Rodin file)
      activateEditor - Set to true when the Prover UI editor has to get activated. When this linking is just intended for background overall coherence, setting to false reduces selection listeners pollution.

    • linkToEventBEditor

      public static void linkToEventBEditor(Object obj)
      Link the current object to an Event-B editor.

      Parameters:
      obj - the object (e.g. an internal element or a Rodin file)

      public static void linkToPreferredEditor(Object obj)
      Link the current object to the preferred editor.

      Parameters:
      obj - the object (e.g. an internal element or a Rodin file)

    • getFreeElementLabel

      public static String getFreeElementLabel(IInternalElement parent, IInternalElementType<?> type)
      Returns a free element label for an element described by its parent and element type.
      Parameters:
      parent - the parent of element for which a free label is wanted
      type - the type of the element we want a label for
      Returns:
      a non already used label for an element

    • getFreeElementLabelIndex

      public static String getFreeElementLabelIndex(IInternalElement parent, IInternalElementType<?> type, String prefix)
      Returns an integer that can be used as a label index for a newly created element.
      Parameters:
      parent - the parent node to be looked for
      type - the type of the element to be looked for
      prefix - the prefix of the element to be looked for
      Returns:
      a non already used integer identifier intended for a new element of that type (if no element of that type already exists, returns beginIndex)

    • getFreeElementLabelIndex

      public static String getFreeElementLabelIndex(List<? extends IInternalElement> elements, String prefix)
      Returns an integer that can be used as a label index for a newly created element.
      Parameters:
      elements - the elements to be looked for
      prefix - the prefix of the element to be looked for
      Returns:
      a non already used integer identifier intended for a new element of that type (if no element of that type already exists, returns beginIndex)

      public static <T> String flatten(List<T> objects, String separator)
      Returns a string representation of a list of input objects. The objects are separated by a given character.
      Parameters:
      objects - a list of objects
      separator - the character to use to separate the objects
      Returns:
      the string representation of input objects

      the comma separated string representation of input objects.

      public static void resetCComboValues(org.eclipse.swt.custom.CCombo combo, IAttributeManipulation manipulation, IInternalElement element, boolean required)

    • addGlobalActionHandler

      public static void addGlobalActionHandler(org.eclipse.ui.IWorkbenchSite site, org.eclipse.ui.IActionBars bars, org.eclipse.ui.actions.ActionFactory globalAction)
      Indicates that a global action is to be implemented by a command.

      This method must be used only if the global action is not already retrofitted to use commands, which is the case for instance for navigate actions. If the global action has already been retrofitted (e.g., org.eclipse.ui.file.new), there is nothing to do.

      Note: Clients must eventually call bars.updateActionBars() for this change to be taken into account.

      Parameters:
      site - site for which the command should be registered (editor, view, view page, etc.)
      bars - action bars for the given site
      globalAction - global action from ActionFactory http://www.eclipse.org/forums/index.php/mv/msg/107499/329140/#msg_329140
      See Also:
      • http://www.eclipse.org/forums/index.php/mv/msg/107499/329140/#msg_329140

    • activateHandlers

      public static void activateHandlers(org.eclipse.jface.viewers.TreeViewer viewer, org.eclipse.ui.IWorkbenchSite site)
      Activates the handlers for expanding and collapsing in a tree viewer
      Parameters:
      viewer - the tree viewer to act on
      site - the site which contains the viewer

    • getHandlerService

      public static org.eclipse.ui.handlers.IHandlerService getHandlerService(org.eclipse.ui.IWorkbenchSite site)
      Returns the handler service attached to the given site
      Parameters:
      site - some site
      Returns:
      the attached handler service

    • createFilterText

      public static org.eclipse.swt.widgets.Text createFilterText(org.eclipse.swt.widgets.Composite parent)
      Creates a filter text box under the given parent.
      Parameters:
      parent - the parent composite
      Returns:
      a filter text

    • setupFilter

      public static void setupFilter(org.eclipse.swt.widgets.Text filter, org.eclipse.jface.viewers.StructuredViewer viewer)
      Sets up the given filter to refresh the given viewer upon text changes.

      It will work only if the given viewer has a content provider and is given an input, although it may not yet be the case when calling this function.

      Parameters:
      filter - a text widget where filter is typed
      viewer - a structured viewer to filter
